description: Boat shoes for teens - enroute have come up with this pimped out pair for its Teen collection! A perfect lounge wear option, this shoe is as comfy and durable as it is stylish. Upper Slip on styling with a Velcro strap across the midfoot Padded inner Stitch detail at the seams of the toe box Padded footbed Outsole TPU textured outsole with tyre tread patterning Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
